portfolio.audience: tech recruiters, potential clients, fellow developers

dark.role: dark background, text in light mode

light.role: light background, text in dark mode

hero.headline: Aymen - Backend Developer
hero.subheadline: Building robust APIs and scalable systems with Python, FastAPI & PostgreSQL
hero.hero_image_prompt: Abstract tech-themed profile avatar for a backend developer, dark indigo and cyan geometric shapes, circuit board patterns, glowing nodes, professional modern style, no face just abstract technology representation

projects.title: Orcheeos API
projects.description: Multi-agent LLM orchestration backend powering intelligent task routing across specialized AI agents. Built with FastAPI for high-performance async endpoints and LangGraph for complex agent workflows.
projects.image_prompt: Server room with glowing API endpoints visualization, dark blue and indigo tones, network nodes connected by light beams, tech thumbnail style, abstract server architecture

projects.title: DataFlow Engine
projects.description: Real-time data pipeline processing over 1 million events per day. Leverages Python for transformation logic, Redis streams for message brokering, and Docker for containerized deployments.
projects.image_prompt: Abstract data flow visualization with streams of light particles moving through pipeline nodes, dark background with cyan and gold data streams, real-time processing concept art

projects.title: Auth Microservice
projects.description: OAuth2/JWT authentication microservice handling secure user identity across distributed systems. Implements FastAPI middleware with PostgreSQL for credential storage and Redis for token blacklisting.
projects.image_prompt: Cybersecurity shield icon with lock and key elements, dark background, golden and indigo glowing security patterns, abstract authentication concept with digital fingerprint

experience.achievement: Led migration from monolithic architecture to microservices, achieving 10x throughput improvement and 99.9% uptime across 50+ services.
Built and maintained REST APIs serving over 500,000 daily active users. Designed database schema handling 2TB+ of relational data with optimized query performance.
Developed 15+ client projects using Django and FastAPI. Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60% across all active projects.
